title: fix: get_blocking missing enable_all on fresh runtimes
description: get_blocking creates tokio runtimes without .enable_all(), causing hard panics when used with network-backed stores outside an existing runtime. run_on_new_thread correctly calls .enable_all(); get_blocking does not. Any caller using get_blocking with aws-sm, doppler, gcp-sm, etc. outside an async context would hit tokio's 'no io driver running' panic rather than receiving SecretError::Backend.
